user.title: BTAlliance Mesh Setup
user.description: Enter your mesh network credentials. The default values work for most Fulife lights.

pick_device.title: Select Gateway Device
pick_device.description: Select the Fulife light to use as the mesh gateway. All other lights on the mesh will be discovered automatically.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm BTAlliance Device
bluetooth_confirm.description: Found {name} at {address}. Configure mesh credentials below.

abort.not_supported: Device is not a supported BTAlliance/Fulife light
abort.no_devices_found: No Fulife devices found. Make sure your lights are powered on and in range.
